hud.questionPlaceholder: e.g. Where is this bond heading?

scene.hint: Top-right: phase & question. Bottom-left: Vision. Select: point with the spirit dot and pinch thumb–index for ~1s. Reveal: cup your fingers for ~1s. After the faces open, the sage streams below.

ritual.washHint: Shake your wrist side to side twice to finish the wash.
ritual.selectHint: {{n}} / {{total}} chosen — point at a card with the spirit dot, pinch thumb and index, and hold ~1s to confirm.
ritual.pinchProgressHint: The bar fills while you hold the pinch; release or move away to reset.
ritual.revealHoldHint: Your draw sits in a row above the deck, backs facing you. Face your palm toward the camera and hold a loose fist or curled fingers (~1s) to flip the cards one by one; interpretation follows.
ritual.revealedDone: Faces revealed. The sage is streaming a reply below.
ritual.cameraSuggest: Turn on Vision first so gestures are tracked.

sage.title: The nameless sage
sage.missingKey: No LLM key: set either (1) VITE_OPENAI_COMPAT_API_KEY + VITE_OPENAI_COMPAT_BASE_URL (e.g. DeepSeek https://api.deepseek.com/v1) or (2) VITE_GEMINI_API_KEY in .env.local — see .env.example.
sage.comicAlt: Four-panel comic generated from tarot reading
sage.comicMissingKey: Missing Doubao image key: set VITE_DOUBAO_API_KEY in .env.local (optionally VITE_DOUBAO_BASE_URL / VITE_DOUBAO_SEEDREAM_MODEL).
sage.comicEmptyReading: Reading text is empty. Finish the reading first.

camera.hint: The browser only asks for the camera after you tap the button. Keep your hand in frame; the index fingertip maps to the glowing point above the spread.
camera.errorGeneric: Could not start the camera or hand model. Check permissions and network.
